---
name: Documentation
about: Improve Tinklepaw docs, examples, diagrams, or public summaries
title: "[Docs] "
labels: documentation
---

## Documentation Problem

What is unclear, missing, stale, or hard to review?

## Target Audience

- User
- Developer
- Reviewer/interviewer
- Maintainer

## Scope

-

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Docs answer the target question.
- [ ] Commands/examples are current.
- [ ] Diagrams render where applicable.
- [ ] Sensitive/private material is excluded.
- [ ] Links are valid.
- [ ] Related README, architecture, data, changelog, or roadmap docs are updated
      or explicitly not needed.
